title: helianthus × laetiflorus var. subrhomboideus
intro: Helianthus × laetiflorus var. subrhomboideus, also known as the swamp sunflower or prairie sunflower, is a variety of flowering plant that belongs to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that aid in treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Helianthus × laetiflorus var. subrhomboideus include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and providing antioxidant properties, which can help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a valuable addition to holistic medicine and natural remedies.
